title: Minimum seats Workcanvas
excerpt:
Hello, 
a client is looking at the possibility of hiring Workcanvas, I know that the monthly cost is 10.9 per seat, but is there any minimum required seats to hire or my client can pay only for 2 seats, 5, etc?

posts.author: JoseV (Jose )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
a client is looking at the possibility of hiring Workcanvas, I know that the monthly cost is 10.9 per seat, but is there any minimum required seats to hire or my client can pay only for 2 seats, 5, etc?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JoseV! The pricing structure is the same as monday.com general pricing. You can find more information about it here. You can choose yearly or monthly plan.

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/13386481657618-WorkCanvas-activation-billing-and-pricing.
